headline: Previously Rejected Articles Now Recovered
subject: Recovered Articles

article_items.title: Company : CNBC Technology
article_items.description: [HIGH] Foreign investors have dumped billions of dollars of Korean stocks this year despite record rally. Here's why Company : CNBC Technology Summary : The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far. Link :
